title: Nexus Shaders
description: Have you ever wanted to run shaders but your PC just refuses? well, this texture pack is just for you!
body:
# **Nexus Shaders**

Have you ever wanted to use shaders but your PC just refuses? Even low-end shaders crashes your Game, Well this Texture Pack is just for you!

Yes, a **Texture Pack**. _Nexus Shaders_ aim to give you a direct experience of using shaders without using shaders..

Since it is a Texture Pack it has an almost 0% impact on performance. Now you might think its just some 128x Texture Pack pretending to be a shader, but no. This Texture Pack adds actual Realistic Lighting,Fog,Bloom,Sky,Nature, etc. From Realistic and Clear Water to Glowing Blocks and Items, it has everything in one single Zip File.


## **Dependencies:**

- Sodium Core Shader Support
- Nuit **and** Nuit Interop
- Polytone
- Continuity
- Natural Motion Blur (this ones optional but motionblur = game feel smooth and clean yay)

Sodium Core Shader Support: For Custom Lighting and Bloom
Nuit and Nuit Interop: For Custom Sky
Polytone: For Custom Atmosphere and Fog
Continuity: For Glowing and Blooming Blocks and stuff


### **Recommended Settings** 

__Quality Tab__
Graphics: Fabulous!
Clouds: OFF
Weather: Fancy
Leaves: Fancy
Smooth Lighting: ON
Entity Shadows: ON
Distortion Effects: ON

__Details Tab__
Sun: OFF
Moon: OFF
